---
title: "Contact"
---

---

## Primary Contact

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
### Email
[contact@shunyamaguchi.com](mailto:contact@shunyamaguchi.com)
:::
I usually respond within 1-3 business days.

---

## Secondary

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
### Facebook Messenger
[https://m.me/shun.yamaguchi.social](https://m.me/shun.yamaguchi.social)
:::

---

## Optional

GitHub Issues (technical discussion only)
